name: Traptrix Vesiculo
name_jp: ジーナの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Traptrix Vesiculo" per turn, and only once that turn. You can send 1 Set Trap you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control no cards in your Spell & Trap Zone: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Hole" Normal Trap in your GY; Set it to your field.
mnst_eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Traptrix Vesiculo" per turn, and only once that turn. You can send 1 Set Trap you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control no cards in your Spell & Trap Zone: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Hole" Normal Trap in your GY; Set it to your field.
eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Traptrix Vesiculo" per turn, and only once that turn. You can send 1 Set Trap you control to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control no cards in your Spell & Trap Zone: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Hole" Normal Trap in your GY; Set it to your field.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
